---
title: "Praktikum PDB (Persamaan Diferensial Biasa)"
subtitle: "Ganjil 2025 - Kurikulum 2024"
toc: false
format: html
---

<a href="../../../../praktikum.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary mb-4">
<i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-left"></i> Kembali ke Arsip Praktikum
</a>

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Daftar Modul

-   **Modul 1: Pengenalan GNU Octave**
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-days" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Jadwal:** 10 s/d 12 September 2025
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Lokasi:** Lab Komputer D.311 (Sesi 1-2) & Lab Statistika D.406 (Sesi 3)
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-book" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Materi:** [Buka Modul 1](./modul1.ipynb)

-   **Modul 2: Plotting Fungsi, Metode Euler, Metode Taylor**
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-days" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Jadwal:** 15 s/d 19 September 2025
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Lokasi:** Lab Komputer D.311 (Sesi 1-2) & Lab Statistika D.406 (Sesi 3)
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-book" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Materi:** [Buka Modul 2](./modul2.ipynb)

-   **Modul 3: Metode Runge-Kutta dan variasinya**
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-days" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Jadwal:** 22 s/d 26 September 2025
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Lokasi:** Lab Komputer D.311 (Sesi 1-2)
    <br> <i class="fa-solid fa-book" aria-hidden="true"></i> **Materi:** [Buka Modul 3](./modul3.ipynb)

## Tugas & Penilaian

::: {.callout-warning icon="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"}
### Belum Ada Tugas
Informasi mengenai tugas, format pengumpulan, dan tenggat waktu akan diumumkan di bagian ini. Harap periksa secara berkala.
:::

:::
